text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! It's finally, finally, finally, finally here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It certainly is! The long-awaited Winning Dream Stage is—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
An endless wasteland, sprawling ahead... Untouched gold mines,
mysterious ancient ruins! Now, take my hand, McQueen! Let's go on
an adventure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! We have a performance today! A
concert!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha, does Golshi ever make sense? It's so McQueen to snatch the
bait too, but... What's this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Earth to Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm here! Is it my time to sing?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Not yet... but are you okay? You look terribly nervous.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... Yeah... Just a little, but... I mean, no. I'm sorry! I'm super nervous!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, everyone's worked so hard to prepare for today's event,
so... I don't wanna ruin it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Balderdash!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What do you keep looking back at, Spe? Are your toes where your
heels should be?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! My toes are in the front!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I know it can be aggravating trying to understand what Gold Ship
means to say, but she has a point, or... a percentage of one, rather.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A commemoration is not only about celebrating the past, but also
paving the way for the future.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right. So basically, don't worry so much about the "up until now,"
'cause we gotta do our best for the "hereafter"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You'll be fine, Spe. Remember...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Every day, no matter what... we've always run forward, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Don't look back... just keep moving forward. Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Our thoughts and feelings will be conveyed through our performance!
